programme.desc: News program bringing Canadians breaking news and live coverage from across Canada and around the world.

programme.desc: A couple head home to Warwickshire after six years in the U.S.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Montreal faces Tampa Bay in Game 5 of the East First Round at Benchmark International Arena. The series remains tied 2-2 after the Lightning won Game 4. Zachary Bolduc and Cole Caufield staked Montreal to an early 2-0 lead before Tampa Bay rallied.

programme.desc: Oneida Nation of the Thames is hard at work reclaiming the economic, cultural and spiritual practices that were banned by government policies over the past 100 years.

programme.title: Wild Cards
programme.sub-title: Eternal Sunshine of the Therapized Mind
programme.desc: When a celebrated therapist and bestselling author is murdered, a bickering Max and Ellis go undercover as a married couple at her wellness retreat and discover more than their chakras.

programme.title: Live: CBC Toronto News
programme.desc: Dwight Drummond and team take a comprehensive look at the top stories, with breaking news, reports and updates relevant to the city of Toronto.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The latest hockey action from across the NHL.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Based on an award-winning memoir from Mark Critch, "Son of a Critch" is the hilarious and very real story of a young Mark coming of age in the 1980s. Developed from Critch's 2018 memoir, which was in turn based on his real life experiences growing up in Newfoundland, Canada, the series is a heartfelt window in the life of a child who is much older inside than his 11 years. He uses comedy and self-deprecation to win friends and connect with the small collection of people in his limited junior high world.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism; Adrienne Arsenault and Ian Hanomansing anchor.

programme.desc: The host presents information about the social, economic and political issues of the day and provides updates on current events in Toronto.

programme.sub-title: Kingdom of the Polar Bears, Part 1
programme.desc: Veteran polar bear guide Dennis Compayre goes on a remarkable journey, providing a rare and intimate glimpse into the world of a polar bear and her newborn cubs as they leave the safety of their den for the first time.
